mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO md_user_tenant_role (user_id, role_id, tenant_id, app_id) VALUES
(#{roleUser.userId}, #{roleUser.roleId}, #{roleUser.tenantId}, #{roleUser.appId})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, name FROM md_role r LEFT JOIN md_tenant_role mtr ON (r.id = mtr.role_id) WHERE r.status = 1 AND mtr.app_id = #{appId} AND mtr.tenant_id IN
#{id}
SELECT muor.user_id FROM md_user_tenant_role muor RIGHT JOIN md_user mu ON muor.user_id = mu.id WHERE muor.role_id = #{roleId} GROUP BY mu.id
SELECT B.id,B.name FROM `md_user_tenant_role` A LEFT JOIN `md_role` B on A.role_id=B.id where B.status=1 and A.tenant_id=#{tenantId} and A.user_id=#{userId} and A.app_id=#{appId}
